bugs.title: CSS class name typo: "decrpt" instead of "decrypt"
steps: Review widget HTML + CSS in original ZIP JSON
bugs.solution: Rename across HTML template, CSS, and JS: s/decrpt/decrypt/g

bugs.title: Duplicate scroll event listener registered in original widget JS
bugs.current: window.addEventListener("scroll", decryptOnScroll) called twice — at end of animate() block AND again 2 lines later
bugs.solution: Remove the second/duplicate addEventListener call at bottom of JS file

bugs.title: Duplicate width:100% property in CSS
bugs.current: width:100% declared twice in same rule block
bugs.expected: Each CSS property declared once per rule

bugs.title: Heading tag hardcoded as <h2> — no heading level control
bugs.current: Heading level is always h2, cannot be changed by user
bugs.expected: Heading tag should be selectable (h1–h6) for correct document outline
bugs.solution: Add "Heading Tag" select control with h1–h6 options; use in template via {{headingTag}}

bugs.title: Encrypted text color #777 on dark #111 background fails WCAG AA contrast (3.6:1)
steps: Check computed CSS color of .is-encrypted spans against #111 background
bugs.expected: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio required for WCAG 2.1 AA (normal text)
bugs.solution: Change .is-encrypted color to #949494 or lighter (minimum) to achieve 4.5:1 against #111

bugs.title: No ARIA live region on the decrypting text container
bugs.current: No aria-live, role, or aria-label on the animating text element
bugs.expected: Screen readers should be informed when text finishes decrypting
bugs.solution: Add aria-live="polite" to .wkit-encrypted and update aria-label to the final decoded text when progress = 100%

bugs.title: Some characters show as decrypted on initial page load before scrolling
bugs.current: 25 spans have is-decrypted class on initial load
bugs.expected: All characters should start as encrypted (is-encrypted) before user scrolls
bugs.solution: Check decryptOnScroll() initial call — if page starts scrolled or widget is above fold, initial call may over-decrypt; add scroll position guard

bugs.title: Heading level hardcoded as h2 — not configurable
bugs.current: Always renders <h2> regardless of page heading hierarchy
bugs.expected: Heading tag should be selectable to fit the page structure
bugs.solution: Add Heading Tag select control (h1/h2/h3/h4/h5/h6) and replace hardcoded h2 in template

passed: data-text populated: "Scroll to decrypt me — QA Test!..."
wrapText() JS ran — encrypted h2 heading rendered
25 spans have data-char attribute (needed for decryption)
Scroll animation triggered — 25 characters decrypted on scroll
axe-core: No WCAG 2.1 AA violations detected
No images in widget (none expected — correct)
Text fits within widget container on mobile
No product console errors on front-end
WDesignKit admin listing verified via MCP (widget active, status: active)
